sections.subtitle: Recent Form - Lecce
sections.text: Lecce is in poor form, winless in their last 13 matches, with 2 draws and 3 losses in the last 5. They've struggled defensively, failing to keep a clean sheet in 11 games, and their attack has been inconsistent, scoring just 3 goals in these matches.

sections.subtitle: Recent Form - Torino
sections.text: Torino has also underperformed recently, with no wins in their last 3 matches (1 draw, 2 losses). However, they managed a 2-0 win against Udinese in their last 5 games, showing some defensive solidity but lacking consistent scoring, with only 3 goals in these matches.

sections.subtitle: Head-to-Head Analysis
sections.text: In the last two head-to-head encounters, Torino has dominated Lecce, with a 2-0 win and a 0-0 draw. Torino has not lost to Lecce in their last 6 meetings, keeping clean sheets in 5 of those games, indicating a strong historical edge.

sections.subtitle: Season Statistics
sections.text: Lecce sits 19th in the league with 28 points and a poor defensive record, conceding 58 goals. Torino, positioned 11th with 44 points, has a more balanced record but struggles to score consistently, with 39 goals this season.

sections.subtitle: Key Factors
sections.text: Lecce’s missing players and defensive vulnerabilities could be exploited by Torino, despite their own attacking inconsistencies. Torino’s historical advantage and better league standing make them slight favorites, though a low-scoring game is likely given both teams’ recent form.
